programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Cam answers a dangerous callout to save a patient in crisis. What surprise does Amanda have in store to celebrate Taz’s ten years in the service? Mike and Eamon’s concerns grow for a newlywed couple who’ve come off their motorbike.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Mike and Eamon treat a car accident victim who’s also been brutally stabbed. Nat and Leonard help a golfer who’s feeling sub-par. And Glenice meets a hero dog who raises the alarm when his owner is thrown from her horse.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
